creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I am sorry, I have failed to reproduce this on my side so far, and  
this being the only report of its kind ever that I recall, I believe 
there most be something very, very specific to your setup causing this, 
not the general port. 

Are you able to debug this somewhat?  From what I have seen so far, I 
am afraid there is nothing I can do.
